medicalId.emergencyAccessDesc: In the event of an emergency, medical professionals can access your vital data using the QR code on your MedAgent physical card or via the secure emergency bypass on your smartphone lock screen. Your data is encrypted and access is logged for your security.

doctors.title: Medical Specialists
doctors.subtitle: Connect with top-rated medical professionals
doctors.search: Search doctors by name or specialty...
doctors.quickMessageDesc: Send a direct note to the next available physician on duty. Response time < 15 mins.
doctors.cantDecide: Can't decide who to speak with?
doctors.cantDecideDesc: Our Clinical AI can triage your symptoms and connect you with the specialist best suited for your specific medical history and current biometric data.

medicines.title: Prescription Management
medicines.subtitle: Your active prescriptions, intake schedules, and automated refill tracking organized by MedAgent AI.
medicines.refillDesc: Your Lisinopril supply is running low (4 days left). Would you like to authorize a refill with MedAgent Pharmacy?
medicines.consistency: Consistency is improving your metabolic response.

scans.title: Scan Imaging
scans.subtitle: Upload your X-Ray, MRI, or CT scans for instant AI-assisted diagnostic insights. MedAgent utilizes deep neural networks to identify anomalies with 99.4% precision.
scans.support: Support for DICOM, JPEG, and PNG formats. Maximum file size: 24MB per study.

emergency.title: Emergency Center
emergency.subtitle: Help is nearby. Activate SOS for immediate broadcast or select a dedicated service below.
